objective: Evaluate whether a Vapi-style appointment assistant collects required details and books safely.

events.content: Hi, I want to book a consultation for tomorrow afternoon.
I can help with that. I will collect your name, email, preferred time, and reason for the call before I confirm anything.
My name is Mira, email is mira@example.com, preferred time is 3 PM, and I need help with an automation workflow.
Summary: Mira wants a consultation tomorrow at 3 PM about an automation workflow. Please confirm I can create the booking.

events.name: create_booking
events.content: Create booking for Mira at 3 PM with email mira@example.com.
